releaseNotes:
## What's Changed
* i18n: 补全 VB-Cable 相关字符串的喵语本地化 by @Jack-Huang-2020 in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/207
* 改进 macOS 界面及相关文档 by @WhatDamon in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/210
* ref: Remove Bluetooth support and related code by @ChouChiu in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/212
* fix: 数据目录迁移至平台标准路径 by @raindropQwQ in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/214
* feat(Web): 新增 Web 模式传输音频 by @ChinsaaWei in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/220
* 重构Web UI，使用Alpine.js提供更强的前端交互能力 by @ChinsaaWei in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/222
* Feat: 音频处理链路可视化与高级调参  by @LanRhyme in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/223


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/compare/v1.3.0...v1.3.1
